case_title: SHABAZOVA, MARIA VS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/T. DOUGHTY

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/T. DOUGHTY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHABAZOVA, MARIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/T. DOUGHTY PLTF FAILED TO PRESENT SUFFICIENT EVIDENCE OF LIABILITY AND IN ADDITION CCSF NOT RESPONSIBLE FOR MAINTAINING AREA WHERE PLTF CLAIMS TO HAVE FALLEN. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
DEFENDANT REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE SENT PAPERS TO JUDGE TO BE SIGNED.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-13-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-24-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SHABAZOVA, MARIA AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/T. DOUGHTY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-26-2001 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-26-2001, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO DEC-13-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFT RETURNED TO COURT.
